title: Update from business groups on the Employment Rights Bill
body: "On Monday 15 December, six business organisations wrote to the Secretary of State for Business and Trade, the Right Hon Peter Kyle MP, expressing the view that the Employment Rights Bill should be passed by Parliament this week. These organisations were:    British Chambers of Commerce   Chartered Institute of Personnel and Development   Confederation of British Industry   Federation of Small Businesses   Recruitment and Employment Confederation   Small Business Britain    Please find this letter and a response from the Secretary of State below.             Joint letter to the Secretary of State for Business and Trade - Employment Rights Bill    PDF, 214 KB, 2 pages     This file may not be suitable for users of assistive technology.    Request an accessible format.    If you use assistive technology (such as a screen reader) and need a version of this document in a more accessible format, please email digital@businessandtrade.gov.uk. Please tell us what format you need. It will help us if you say what assistive technology you use.                 Response from Secretary of State for Business and Trade to business organisations - Employment Rights Bill    PDF, 158 KB, 2 pages     This file may not be suitable for users of assistive technology.    Request an accessible format.    If you use assistive technology (such as a screen reader) and need a version of this document in a more accessible format, please email digital@businessandtrade.gov.uk. Please tell us what format you need. It will help us if you say what assistive technology you use.     "

taxons.title: Your rights at work and trade unions
